_description: Global cross-universe risk limits — applies to ALL markets (sp500, sector_etfs, commodity_etfs)
_reason: Apr 24 audit: 1.75x leverage hit because per-universe sizers ignore positions in other universes; PDT triggered 103x on AVGO

cross_universe_guard._notes: Hard cap across all universes. Risk-reducing orders (exits/stops/TPs) are NEVER gated.
cross_universe_guard._activation_note: 2026-04-28: enabled=false until live position count attrits to <=7. Operator flips to true via separate config commit when ready.
